column1: # Commands sorted by coverage_pct (ascending) to prioritize gaps
for bead in emacs-ags emacs-1n7 emacs-blx emacs-eii emacs-crn emacs-ckg emacs-rqp emacs-dw4 emacs-48j emacs-s75; do echo "=== $bead ==="; bd show "$bead" 2>/dev/null | head -5; done
column8: emacs-ags, emacs-1n7, emacs-blx, emacs-eii, emacs-crn, emacs-ckg, emacs-rqp, emacs-dw4, emacs-48j, emacs-s75

column1:
for id in emacs-aa89 emacs-jv63 emacs-nldf emacs-b01z emacs-8oyz emacs-gaah emacs-wxn1 emacs-85i3; do
  echo "=== $id ==="
  bd show $id --format '{{.Description}}' 2>&1
  echo ""
done
column8: emacs-aa89, emacs-jv63, emacs-nldf, emacs-b01z, emacs-8oyz, emacs-gaah, emacs-wxn1, emacs-85i3, echo, === $id ===

column1:
for commit in 00950fb 7abad63 b7d3bec d93c732 9862675 6d84cfd; do
  echo "=== $commit ==="
  git show --stat --format="%s%n%b" $commit | head -30
  echo ""
done

for change in scoped-bash-command-execution gptel-preset-upstream-alignment gptel-preset-refactor; do
  echo "=== $change ==="
  if [ -d "openspec/changes/$change/specs" ]; then
    find "openspec/changes/$change/specs" -name "spec.md" -type f | sed 's|^openspec/changes/[^/]*/specs/||' || echo "  (no spec.md files)"
  else
    echo "  (no specs directory)"
  fi
done
column8: scoped-bash-command-execution, gptel-preset-upstream-alignment, gptel-preset-refactor, echo, === $change ===, echo,   (no spec.md files), echo,   (no specs directory)

column1: for bead_id in emacs-7jj emacs-7xb emacs-qwu emacs-9lu emacs-9hs emacs-oyg emacs-u5z; do\n  bd show "$bead_id" 2>&1 | grep -E "^\S" | head -1\ndone
column8: emacs-7jj, emacs-7xb, emacs-qwu, emacs-9lu, emacs-9hs, emacs-oyg, emacs-u5z

column1: for change in scoped-bash-command-execution gptel-preset-upstream-alignment gptel-preset-refactor; do echo "=== $change ==="; find "openspec/changes/$change/specs" -name "spec.md" 2>/dev/null | head -5; done

for preset in explore executor research plan; do echo "=== $preset.md ==="; grep -E "^(use-tools|include-tool-results):" /Users/jefffarr/emacs/config/gptel/presets/$preset.md 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND"; done

cd openspec/changes/bash-parser-file-ops/specs && for dir in */; do
  echo "Copying ${dir%/}..."
  cp -r "$dir" "../../../specs/"
done && echo "Sync complete"
